item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal, Chelsea eye move for Álvarez
item.description: The two major London clubs are linked with a move with Atlético Madrid's Julián Álvarez. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: Men's Bubble Watch: Virginia Tech gets biggest victory yet with Clemson upset
item.description: Another ranked upset adds more intrigue to the race for the NCAA tournament.

item.title: Women's Power Rankings: A big week for the top of the Big 12
item.description: Baylor, up five spots in our rankings, is once again atop the Big 12, with WVU, Texas Tech and TCU not far behind.

item.title: K-State coach rips team: Don't deserve to be here
item.description: In a brief but tense postgame news conference, Kansas State coach Jerome Tang questioned his team's pride after a 91-62 loss to Cincinnati, saying, "T...

item.title: UK PM demands apology from 'offensive' Ratcliffe
item.description: Several Manchester United supporters groups condemned comments made by co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe after the British billionaire said the U.K. has been...
